name: RPlog_A_Place_in_the_Universe
title: A Place in the Universe
summary: Johanna tracks down the hardened young Chana at the Spacebarn on Nar Shaddaa, finding her crouched over a crowd-control blaster doing odd jobs. Rather than buy a weapon, the freight-hauling pilot offers Chana an open crew spot aboard her ship -- honest, unglamorous work moving supplies, ore, and parts rather than the slaving and narcotics of the underworld. Chana, who can leave her current boss at the Rancor more or less whenever, agrees to try it out, and the two feel each other out over pay, commitment, and the danger that well-intentioned outfits can slide into oppression. Chana bristles when Johanna probes her loyalty, declaring she gives blood, sweat, and tears to any job she takes -- exactly the offended reply that earns Johanna's trust. They shake on it, Chana introducing herself fully as Chanera Thorn, and the new arrangement is sealed on warm, wry terms.
